text.tspan: Share of people that have received at least one dose of the COVID-19
Share of the population in each age group that has received at least one vaccine dose. This may not equal the share that has
completed the initial protocol if the vaccine requires two doses.
Source: Official data collated by Our World in Data
Note: In some territories, vaccination coverage may include non-residents (such as tourists and foreign workers) so per-capita metrics may
